headline: Eli Lilly Leads 5 Stocks Near Buy Points As The Market Rally Rotates
summary: Eli Lilly and EZ Corp. lead stocks to watch near buy points this week as investors seek shelter in defensive growth names.  The relative strength lines of all top five stocks near buy points are making new highs or near highs.  The strong RS lines, which track performance vs. the S&P 500, are especially bullish given the overall uncertain stock market.
